channel.title: Research on SPERIXLABS
channel.description: Recent content in Research on SPERIXLABS

item.title: Research Publications
item.description: Reverse Engineering Possible Implementation Flaws in Mobile Applications: A Security Audit of a Bank’s Mobile Application. https://tinyurl.com/yc3fxh3k Unauthorised User Account Access on iRokotv platform. http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.25486.79681/2 Reverse Engineering GhanaPostGPS Mobile Application to Create an Application Programming Interface for Local Developers. http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.24355.27684/2 A Security Analysis of WhatsApp iOS Mobile Application. http://dx.doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.30510.33605 Academic Research A Lightweight Messaging Protocol for Internet of Things Devices.
